headline: “Grow a Spine”: All-In Podcast Pushes Back on AI Regulation and Calls PayPal’s $60 Takeover Offer Just an Opening Bid
summary: David Sacks issued a sharp warning to tech executives cozying up to Washington regulators, while investors are already debating whether PayPal's reported takeover offer drastically undersells one of fintech's most contested assets.
